title: create a calendar with AI
excerpt: create a calendar where tasks can be added and seen on a time basis with an AI feature that will move non completed tasks to a future date depending on the priority setting and due date.

posts.author: Lusy (Lusery Valdivia Vasquez)
posts.cookedHtml: create a calendar where tasks can be added and seen on a time basis with an AI feature that will move non completed tasks to a future date depending on the priority setting and due date.
